ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the customer recommends the product */,
  "positive_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive feedback comments on the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "thumbs_up" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs up the review has received */,
  "thumbs_down" INTEGER /* Number of thumbs down the review has received */,
  "moderator_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been approved by a moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the customer's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., General, Petite) */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Tops, Dresses) */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., Knits, Wovens) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderator account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer, administrator, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who performed the search */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date and time the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the recommendation is made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
